reviews.comment:
buena atención, pero se merece una buena actualización, el Full y la.imagen en general.
Atención del personal 10 puntos. Para inflar neumáticos gratis, genial eso es servicio (las con monedas.....no).

(Translated by Google)
Good service, but it needs a good update, both the full service and the overall image.
Staff service is top-notch. Free tire inflation is great, that's real service (unlike the coin-operated ones...not so much).
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15539995661554460615/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNHZy1XR3B3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Hace años que lamentablemente el ACA dejó de brindar los servicios que lo hicieron grande. Duele recordar lo que fue y que hoy sea como una repartición pública.

(Translated by Google)
Unfortunately, the ACA stopped providing the services that made it great years ago. It's painful to remember what it once was and how it's now like a public agency.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15539995661554460615/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNHemUyckRBEAE

reviews.comment:
Estación de servicios ubicada en pleno centro de la ciudad, con el agregado estar asociada al ACA, calidad de productos y servicios, buena atención y con ventajas para los socios.

(Translated by Google)
Service station located in the heart of the city, with the added benefit of being associated with the ACA, quality products and services, good service and advantages for members.
